title: Mossy Deepslate Bricks
description: Adds a 20% chance for placed deepslate bricks to have a mossy texture
body: Adds 20% chance for Deepslate Bricks to look mossy, similar to Mossy Stone Bricks. The moss is just darker to fit with the deepslate's colour. 80% of the deepslate bricks should have the vanilla non-mossy texture.
